prerequisites.freshFullPipelineRun: data/attestation.json — machine-generated by run-attest.js, bound to the sealed forecast hash and the active card; expires; production also requires SHARP_PRODUCTION=1

bankroll.label: ENTERTAINMENT
bankroll.note: money the human is content to lose for entertainment. Not a research stake, not a validated edge, not Kelly.

caps.provenance: chosen by the human as entertainment limits; NOT derived from Kelly, NOT fitted to any result, NOT evidence of edge

humanReviewAlerts.why: potentially new information with a single origin
humanReviewAlerts.text:
🔎 HUMAN REVIEW — UNVERIFIED

Kamaru Usman vs Dricus Du Plessis

Reported about Kamaru Usman: Kamaru Usman's knees are severely damaged, impacting his mobility.

What kind of report: potentially new information with a single origin
Independent origins: 1 — a single source said this, nobody corroborated it
Topic: injury_health
Heard in: a YouTube preview transcript collected for this card

THIS IS UNVERIFIED INFORMATION.
It is one report picked out of a transcript. It has not been checked against the UFC,
the promotion, or any official source, and it may simply be wrong or already out of date.

This is NOT an instruction and NOT a forecast.
The sealed forecast did NOT move on this: it applied no adjustment at all — a one-origin report cannot clear the magnitude rules, so this moved nothing

If you want to act on it, verify it yourself first.

buyInstructions.why: new evidence changed the sealed forecast (2a1c3d1865186633 -> b417ae82eb8cfa9e)
buyInstructions.text:
🧪 EXPERIMENTAL — MANUAL PLACEMENT ONLY

Kamaru Usman vs Dricus Du Plessis

BUY: Will Dricus Du Plessis win the Du Plessis vs Usman professional MMA fight scheduled for Jul 18, 2026?
Ticker: KXUFCFIGHT-26JUL18DUUSM-DU
Side: YES

Executable price now: 67.0¢
Maximum acceptable price: 61.7¢  ← do not pay more

Stake: 3% of your $100 entertainment bankroll = $3.00
Approximate contracts: 4
Tier: CREATIVE SPECULATIVE (entertainment sizing — NOT Kelly, NOT sized from a measured edge)

Ranked #1 of 1 contracts Kalshi lists on this fight.
Why it ranks above the alternatives: EXPLORATION lane — creative speculative. CREATIVE SPECULATIVE: 1 origin(s), credible_single_origin, central EV 0.0293

Why it qualifies:
• Dricus Du Plessis — weight_cut: Dricus Du Plessis is one of the biggest middleweights in the division. (favors_about)
• 1 independent origin(s) · MECHANISTICALLY RELEVANT · NOVEL
• May be underpriced: not yet widely public

Main counterargument:
• The hypothesis is unverified — one origin, no corroboration
• CREATIVE SPECULATIVE — one uncertain hypothesis, capped, prospectively graded, UNPROVEN

DO NOT place it if:
• the ask is above 61.7¢ when you look
• the hypothesis is disconfirmed before first bell
• the fight has started or the market is suspended
• you cannot fill the whole size at or under the maximum price

System range: 27.3%–38.3%
Conservative value after fees: -6.8 pts
Evidence coverage: PARTIALLY COVERED
Model status: EXPLORATION (MECHANISTICALLY RELEVANT, 1 origin(s))
Snapshot: 2026-07-18T02:37:40.418Z

YOU MUST SUBMIT THIS MANUALLY on Kalshi.
This system has no order path and cannot place, modify or close anything.

📌 STATUS: RECOMMENDATION — NOT CONFIRMED. Real stake $0, excluded from your bankroll P&L
   until you confirm you placed it:  node run-confirm-placement.js confirm KXUFCFIGHT-26JUL18DUUSM-DU --price=<fill> --stake=<$>

⚠ This system has NOT demonstrated a predictive edge. The only evaluation that ever
  showed one was void (contaminated baseline). Treat this as entertainment.
